sourceSections.appliesWhen: Login, identity proofing, credential validation, account recovery, protected URL authentication
Password storage, generation, reset, display, notification, complexity, and account lockout behavior
Access, transaction, authentication, account-change, and audit logging
Encryption, certificates, crypto modules, random values, and key-management behavior
Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
Secure configuration, authorization checks, injection prevention, concurrency, initialization, update safety, and review
Session lifecycle, revocation, identifiers, cookies, timeout, and logout behavior
Generic errors, safe server configuration, memory cleanup, and safe logger behavior
Upload, download, generated-file, path, extension, content, and filesystem authorization behavior
Buffer, resource, memory cleanup, and sensitive-memory behavior
Input source classification, canonicalization, allow-listing, byte/control-character, and path validation
Output standardization, contextual encoding, command/query output sanitization, and server-side encoding
Least privilege, temporary data, protected storage, source disclosure, comments, unnecessary artifacts, GET parameters, and autocomplete
Trusted authorization objects, central authorization, deny-by-default behavior, privileged separation, and protected resources
PAN production-data exclusion from tests/development and test-account cleanup

sourceRows.guidelineText: La autenticación deberá realizarse a través del Directorio activo de Femsa Comercio como LDAP alineándose a las políticas ya establecidas.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Login, identity proofing, credential validation, account recovery, protected URL authentication
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Habilitar la sincronización de password o single sign on.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Si su aplicación gestiona un almacén de credenciales, se debe garantizar mecanismos de encriptación robustos.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Login, identity proofing, credential validation, account recovery, protected URL authentication
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Requerir autorización para todos los recursos y páginas excepto aquellas específicamente clasificadas como públicas.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Todos los controles de autenticación deben ser efectuados en un entorno confiable como el servidor.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Login, identity proofing, credential validation, account recovery, protected URL authentication
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Todos los controles de autenticación deben fallar de una forma segura.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Login, identity proofing, credential validation, account recovery, protected URL authentication
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Las respuestas a los fallos en la autenticación no deben indicar cual parte de la autenticación fue incorrecta, solo deberá proporcionar respuestas genéricas.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Login, identity proofing, credential validation, account recovery, protected URL authentication
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Utilizar únicamente peticiones del tipo HTTP(S) POST para la transmisión de credenciales de autenticación.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Re autenticar usuarios antes de la realización de operaciones críticas.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Verificar la aplicabilidad de implementación para los patrones de diseño seguro Secure Factory, Secure Strategy Factory, Secure Builder, Secure Chain of Responsibility, Secure State Machine, Single Sign On establecidos en el documento de patrones de diseño seguro en las secciones 2 y 4.1.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Login, identity proofing, credential validation, account recovery, protected URL authentication
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: No deberá haber contraseñas en el código de la aplicación en cuestión.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: La contraseña NO deberá ser derivada del id de usuario.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: El hash de las contraseñas debe ser implementado en un entorno confiable como el servidor.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Utilizar únicamente conexiones encriptadas o datos encriptados para el envío de contraseñas que no sean temporales.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Hacer cumplir por medio de la política de Grupo FEMSA los requerimientos de complejidad y longitud de la contraseña.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: No se debe desplegar en la pantalla la contraseña ingresada.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Notificar a los usuarios cada vez que se produce un cambio o solicitud de cambio de una contraseña.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Prevenir la reutilización de contraseñas.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Deshabilitar la funcionalidad de recordar campos de contraseñas.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Habilitar pantalla o ventana de registro del usuario.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: La contraseña deberá generarse de manera aleatoria siguiendo el estándar de seguridad.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Password storage, generation, reset, display, notification, complexity, and account lockout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Habilitar que solo el usuario debe tener acceso a su contraseña.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Password storage, generation, reset, display, notification, complexity, and account lockout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Las contraseñas temporales deberán tener un tiempo de expiración corto, determinado por la política o estándar de contraseñas.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Password storage, generation, reset, display, notification, complexity, and account lockout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Cuando la contraseña haya sido generada por el administrador, el usuario deberá ser forzado a cambiar su contraseña al momento de autenticarse por primera vez al sistema.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Password storage, generation, reset, display, notification, complexity, and account lockout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Si es habilitado el cambio de contraseña para el usuario, esta deberá ser enviada a su correo electrónico, sin incluirse el nombre de usuario en el correo.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Password storage, generation, reset, display, notification, complexity, and account lockout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: El cambio de contraseña deberá ser notificado al usuario vía correo electrónico.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Password storage, generation, reset, display, notification, complexity, and account lockout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: La contraseña deberá estar enmascarada.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Incluir leyenda de responsabilidad del usuario para el buen manejo de su cuenta.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Password storage, generation, reset, display, notification, complexity, and account lockout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: La cuenta deberá bloquearse después de 5 intentos fallidos de autentificarse en m cantidad de tiempo.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Si se restablece el uso basado de correo electrónico, solo se envía un correo electrónico a una dirección previamente registrada con un enlace / contraseña temporal.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Habilitar el registro de errores y excepciones. No necesariamente deben ser mostrados al usuario.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Habilitar el registro en caso de cambio de los mecanismos de identificación y autenticación incluidos la creación de cuentas y aumento de privilegios y de todos los cambios, incorporaciones y eliminaciones de las cuentas con privilegios administrativos o de root.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Access, transaction, authentication, account-change, and audit logging
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Utilizar una rutina o componente centralizada para todas las operaciones de logging.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Access, transaction, authentication, account-change, and audit logging
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: No guardar información clasificada por OXXO como privilegiada, restringida o confidencial, en los registros, incluyendo detalles innecesarios del sistema.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Access, transaction, authentication, account-change, and audit logging
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Utilizar una función de hash para validar la integridad de los archivos de registro.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Access, transaction, authentication, account-change, and audit logging
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: En caso de recopilar, almacenar, transferir información tipificada como sensible, deberá encriptarse y enmascararse. Entiéndase por información sensible: datos personales, patrimoniales o datos de tarjeta de débito y crédito. En los casos en que esta información sea de tarjetas de crédito deberán cumplirse con las medidas de seguridad que dicta la regulación PCI.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Encryption, certificates, crypto modules, random values, and key-management behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: La información no debe guardarse en texto plano en los archivos de configuración del desarrollo.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Encryption, certificates, crypto modules, random values, and key-management behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: La pantalla de autenticación siempre deberá estar encriptada.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Encryption, certificates, crypto modules, random values, and key-management behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: En caso de aplicaciones publicadas a la red externa, estas deberán tener un certificado de seguridad.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Encryption, certificates, crypto modules, random values, and key-management behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Todas las funciones de criptografía de la aplicación deben ser implementadas en entornos confiables (servidor).

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Los módulos de criptografía deberían, en caso de falla, fallar en forma segura.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Encryption, certificates, crypto modules, random values, and key-management behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Todos los números aleatorios, nombres aleatorios, GUIDs y frases aleatorias deberían generarse utilizando módulos aprobados para su generación.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Encryption, certificates, crypto modules, random values, and key-management behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Establecer y utilizar una política y un proceso de cómo manejar las claves criptográficas.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Encryption, certificates, crypto modules, random values, and key-management behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Establecer roles a fin de segregar acceso y funciones.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Habilitar Parametrized Stored Procedures para acceder a las bases de datos.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Restringir el ingreso directo a los objetos de las bases de datos habilitando listas de accesos, triggers o grants.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Deshabilitar consultas dinámicas a través de Parametrized Stored Procedures.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: No debe existir información de conexión a la base de datos (“connection strings”) dentro del código de la aplicación.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Cerrar las conexiones a la base de datos tan pronto sea posible, con la función close del lenguaje utilizado.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Cambiar o deshabilitar las contraseñas predeterminadas.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Configurar contraseñas seguras para las bases de datos, con base en las mejores prácticas.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Deshabilitar todas las funcionalidades innecesarias de la base de datos.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: La aplicación deberá conectarse a la base de datos con credenciales diferentes para cada nivel de confianza.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Eliminar el contenido innecesario incluido por el proveedor.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Utilizar validación de las entradas y codificación de las salidas y manejar caracteres especiales. Si esto falla, no ejecutar el comando de la base de datos.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Database roles, safe query patterns, connection handling, and database hardening
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: No deben usar parámetros de configuración expuestos dentro del código (servidores, usuarios, contraseñas). Es preferible usar archivos de configuración encriptados.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Secure configuration, authorization checks, injection prevention, concurrency, initialization, update safety, and review
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Deshabilitar conexiones directas al URL de la misma de manera anónima o con un usuario sin privilegios para su funcionalidad.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Secure configuration, authorization checks, injection prevention, concurrency, initialization, update safety, and review
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Las direcciones web no podrán ser llamadas de manera directa si no se ha comprobado que el usuario esté autenticado y tenga privilegios para acceder a esa página.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Secure configuration, authorization checks, injection prevention, concurrency, initialization, update safety, and review
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: No se deben exponer referencias manipulables a objetos internos sin validar como parámetros de forma o URLs.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Secure configuration, authorization checks, injection prevention, concurrency, initialization, update safety, and review
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Verificar el cumplimiento del código con base en el estándar definido para la plataforma en la que fue desarrollado.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Todas las validaciones fallidas deberán ser rechazadas.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Establecer mecanismos que eviten la inyección de código no autorizado o malicioso.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Utilizar locks para evitar múltiples accesos simultáneos a los recursos o mecanismos de sincronización.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Inicializar explícitamente todas las variables y mecanismos de almacenamiento de información durante su declaración o antes de usarlos por primera vez.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Las aplicaciones que requieran privilegios especiales deberán elevar privilegios solo cuando sea necesario y devolverlos lo antes posible.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Implementar mecanismos seguros para actualizaciones; si hay actualizaciones automáticas, utilizar firmas criptográficas y verificar dichas firmas.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Secure configuration, authorization checks, injection prevention, concurrency, initialization, update safety, and review
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Revisar por un agente externo al equipo de desarrollo el código, en busca de vulnerabilidades de seguridad.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Implementar controles de administración de sesiones y con AC.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Terminar la sesión o la conexión completamente al recibir una función de logout.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Session lifecycle, revocation, identifiers, cookies, timeout, and logout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Establecer un timeout de sesión debido a inactividad en un tiempo razonablemente corto.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Session lifecycle, revocation, identifiers, cookies, timeout, and logout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Generar un nuevo identificador de sesión con cada re-autenticación.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Session lifecycle, revocation, identifiers, cookies, timeout, and logout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: No permitir logins concurrentes con el mismo ID de usuario.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Session lifecycle, revocation, identifiers, cookies, timeout, and logout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: No exponer identificadores de sesión en URLs, mensajes de error o logs, ni pasarlos como parámetros en una petición GET.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Session lifecycle, revocation, identifiers, cookies, timeout, and logout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Generar un nuevo identificador de sesión si la conexión cambia de HTTP a HTTPS durante la autenticación.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Session lifecycle, revocation, identifiers, cookies, timeout, and logout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: La creación de identificadores de sesión solo debe ser realizada en un entorno seguro como el servidor.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Session lifecycle, revocation, identifiers, cookies, timeout, and logout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Los controles de administración de sesiones deben utilizar algoritmos que generen identificadores aleatorios.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: La función de logout debe estar disponible en todas las páginas protegidas por autenticación.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Session lifecycle, revocation, identifiers, cookies, timeout, and logout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Si una sesión fue establecida antes del login, cerrar dicha sesión y establecer una nueva luego de un login exitoso.
sourceRows.appliesWhen: Session lifecycle, revocation, identifiers, cookies, timeout, and logout behavior
sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Considerar que los archivos deben ser autenticados antes de que sean tomados o cargados.

sourceRows.guidelineText: Los archivos deberán guardarse en un servidor/carpeta de contenidos o en la base de datos, no en la misma aplicación.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.

sourceRows.guidelineText: No incluir en parámetros nombres de directorios o rutas de archivos; utilizar índices asociados internamente a rutas predefinidas.

sourceRows.evidenceExpectation: Use review-safe evidence only: file paths, artifact refs, section anchors, sanitized summaries, command summaries, or redacted placeholders.
